should_trigger.prompt: Find and categorize the tech debt in this codebase
What technical debt should we address first?
Scan for code smells and debt indicators
Help me with techdebt patterns in my Ruby project

should_not_trigger.prompt: Review the code changes for bugs
Commit the current changes and push to the remote branch

hard_should_trigger.prompt: Before the sprint, inventory what cleanup work we've been deferring
After fixing the bug, also check if techdebt needs updating

hard_should_not_trigger.prompt: Do a project health audit covering all quality dimensions
Fix this bug then run the test suite and review the results
